title: Contain Zephyr fuel-gauge sign warnings
description: Boot failure discovered by project-LICHEN-m5m1.5. hal.power_providers fails on Native64 and QEMU because pinned Zephyr 3.7 fuel_gauge.h compares int loop indices with size_t under -Werror=sign-compare. Add a narrowly scoped compatibility treatment around the external header or carry an explicit upstream patch; do not disable warnings-as-errors globally or alter licenses.
acceptance_criteria: 1. LICHEN warnings remain errors. 2. Only the known external Zephyr header diagnostics are contained or corrected. 3. HAL power-provider firmware boots and passes on Native64 and QEMU. 4. No license/SPDX identifier is changed. 5. Three independent review passes complete.
close_reason: Contained only Zephyr 3.7 fuel_gauge.h sign-compare diagnostics; warnings remain errors; HAL power providers boot and pass on Native64 and QEMU; review completed.
